name: América Móvil, S.A.B. de C.V.
description: América Móvil, S.A.B. de C.V. is a leading provider of telecommunications services in Latin America and one of the largest mobile network operators in the world in terms of equity subscribers. Headquartered in Mexico City, the company offers a comprehensive portfolio of services, including wireless and fixed-line voice, wireless and fixed data, broadband internet, pay television, and other related information technology and advertising services across multiple countries in the Americas and Europe.
